evidence.rule_summary_from_author: Opal Locking SP AccessControl associates MBRControl.Set with two ACEs. ACE_MBRControl_Admins_Set has BooleanExpr Admins and Columns Enable, Done, DoneOnReset, while ACE_MBRControl_Set_DoneToDOR has BooleanExpr Admins and Columns Done, DoneOnReset only. Core ACE Columns identify the table columns controlled by an ACE, and ACE.Set may personalize BooleanExpr without changing the ACE's Columns. Therefore personalizing only ACE_MBRControl_Set_DoneToDOR to User1 can authorize User1 to Set Done or DoneOnReset, but cannot authorize Set of Enable nor any mixed Set containing Enable.

5.3.4.3.3 Modifying the BooleanExpr Column The BooleanExpr column of the ACE table is modifiable using the Set method. Some implementations MAY allow the BooleanExpr column to be set to an empty list. If the BooleanExpr column value is an empty list, that ACE cannot be satisfied and as such always resolves to False. If an implementation does not permit the BooleanExpr column to be set to an empty list, attempts to do so SHALL result in the Set method failing with a status of INVALID_PARAMETER.

evidence.rule_summary_from_author: Opal Locking SP AccessControl associates MBRControl.Set with two ACEs. ACE_MBRControl_Admins_Set has BooleanExpr Admins and Columns Enable, Done, DoneOnReset, while ACE_MBRControl_Set_DoneToDOR has BooleanExpr Admins and Columns Done, DoneOnReset only. Core ACE Columns identify the table columns controlled by an ACE, and ACE.Set may personalize BooleanExpr without changing the ACE's Columns. Therefore personalizing only ACE_MBRControl_Set_DoneToDOR to User1 can authorize User1 to Set Done or DoneOnReset, but cannot authorize Set of Enable nor any mixed Set containing Enable.

source_snippets.text: 5.3.4.3.2 BooleanExpr Column Format The BooleanExpr column of the ACE table has a type of AC_element. Table 210 contains an encoding example of the AC_element list representing the infix ACE expression: ((00 00 00 09 00 00 00 32 AND 00 00 00 09 00 00 00 24) OR 00 00 00 09 00 00 82 73) AND 00 00 00 09 00 00 77 28 Table 210 ACE_expression Encoding Example ```json [ {"Token": "F0", "Meaning": "Start List"}, {"Token": "F2", "Meaning": "Start Name"}, {"Token": "A4 00 00 0C 05", "Meaning": "Half-UID – Authority_object_ref"}, {"Token": "A8 00 00 00 09 00 00 00 32", "Meaning": "Authority_object_ref"}, {"Token": "F3", "Meaning": "End Name"}, {"Token": "F2", "Meaning": "Start Name"}, {"Token": "A4 00 00 0C 05", "Meaning": "Half-UID – Authority_object_ref"}, {"Token": "A8 00 00 00 09 00 00 00 24", "Meaning": "Authority_object_ref"}, {"Token": "F3", "Meaning": "End Name"}, {"Token": "F2", "Meaning": "Start Name"}, {"Token": "A4 00 00 04 0E", "Meaning": "Half-UID – boolean_ACE"}, {"Token": "00", "Meaning": "boolean_ACE - AND"}, {"Token": "F3", "Meaning": "End Name"}, {"Token": "F2", "Meaning": "Start Name"}, {"Token": "A4 00 00 0C 05", "Meaning": "Half-UID – Authority_object_ref"}, {"Token": "A8 00 00 00 09 00 00 82 73", "Meaning": "Authority_object_ref"}, {"Token": "F3", "Meaning": "End Name"}, {"Token": "F2", "Meaning": "Start Name"}, {"Token": "A4 00 00 04 0E", "Meaning": "Half-UID – boolean_ACE"}, {"Token": "01", "Meaning": "boolean_ACE - OR"}, {"Token": "F3", "Meaning": "End Name"}, {"Token": "F2", "Meaning": "Start Name"}, {"Token": "A4 00 00 0C 05", "Meaning": "Half-UID – Authority_object_ref"}, {"Token": "A8 00 00 00 09 00 00 77 28", "Meaning": "Authority_object_ref"}, {"Token": "F3", "Meaning": "End Name"}, {"Token": "F2", "Meaning": "Start Name"}, {"Token": "A4 00 00 04 0E", "Meaning": "Half-UID – boolean_ACE"}, {"Token": "00", "Meaning": "boolean_ACE - AND"}, {"Token": "F3", "Meaning": "End Name"}, {"Token": "F1", "Meaning": "End List"}, ] ```

5.3.4.3.3 Modifying the BooleanExpr Column The BooleanExpr column of the ACE table is modifiable using the Set method. Some implementations MAY allow the BooleanExpr column to be set to an empty list. If the BooleanExpr column value is an empty list, that ACE cannot be satisfied and as such always resolves to False. If an implementation does not permit the BooleanExpr column to be set to an empty list, attempts to do so SHALL result in the Set method failing with a status of INVALID_PARAMETER.

Although cells in this table are marked as Read-Only with fixed access control, the access control for invocation of the Get method is (N). • The ACL column is readable only via the GetACL method. evidence.rule_summary_from_author: Opal Locking SP AccessControl associates MBRControl.Set with two ACEs. ACE_MBRControl_Admins_Set has BooleanExpr Admins and Columns Enable, Done, DoneOnReset, while ACE_MBRControl_Set_DoneToDOR has BooleanExpr Admins and Columns Done, DoneOnReset only. Core ACE Columns identify the table columns controlled by an ACE, and ACE.Set may personalize BooleanExpr without changing the ACE's Columns. Therefore personalizing only ACE_MBRControl_Set_DoneToDOR to User1 can authorize User1 to Set Done or DoneOnReset, but cannot authorize Set of Enable nor any mixed Set containing Enable.

source_snippets.text: 5.3.4.3.2 BooleanExpr Column Format The BooleanExpr column of the ACE table has a type of AC_element. Table 210 contains an encoding example of the AC_element list representing the infix ACE expression: ((00 00 00 09 00 00 00 32 AND 00 00 00 09 00 00 00 24) OR 00 00 00 09 00 00 82 73) AND 00 00 00 09 00 00 77 28 Table 210 ACE_expression Encoding Example ```json [ {"Token": "F0", "Meaning": "Start List"}, {"Token": "F2", "Meaning": "Start Name"}, {"Token": "A4 00 00 0C 05", "Meaning": "Half-UID – Authority_object_ref"}, {"Token": "A8 00 00 00 09 00 00 00 32", "Meaning": "Authority_object_ref"}, {"Token": "F3", "Meaning": "End Name"}, {"Token": "F2", "Meaning": "Start Name"}, {"Token": "A4 00 00 0C 05", "Meaning": "Half-UID – Authority_object_ref"}, {"Token": "A8 00 00 00 09 00 00 00 24", "Meaning": "Authority_object_ref"}, {"Token": "F3", "Meaning": "End Name"}, {"Token": "F2", "Meaning": "Start Name"}, {"Token": "A4 00 00 04 0E", "Meaning": "Half-UID – boolean_ACE"}, {"Token": "00", "Meaning": "boolean_ACE - AND"}, {"Token": "F3", "Meaning": "End Name"}, {"Token": "F2", "Meaning": "Start Name"}, {"Token": "A4 00 00 0C 05", "Meaning": "Half-UID – Authority_object_ref"}, {"Token": "A8 00 00 00 09 00 00 82 73", "Meaning": "Authority_object_ref"}, {"Token": "F3", "Meaning": "End Name"}, {"Token": "F2", "Meaning": "Start Name"}, {"Token": "A4 00 00 04 0E", "Meaning": "Half-UID – boolean_ACE"}, {"Token": "01", "Meaning": "boolean_ACE - OR"}, {"Token": "F3", "Meaning": "End Name"}, {"Token": "F2", "Meaning": "Start Name"}, {"Token": "A4 00 00 0C 05", "Meaning": "Half-UID – Authority_object_ref"}, {"Token": "A8 00 00 00 09 00 00 77 28", "Meaning": "Authority_object_ref"}, {"Token": "F3", "Meaning": "End Name"}, {"Token": "F2", "Meaning": "Start Name"}, {"Token": "A4 00 00 04 0E", "Meaning": "Half-UID – boolean_ACE"}, {"Token": "00", "Meaning": "boolean_ACE - AND"}, {"Token": "F3", "Meaning": "End Name"}, {"Token": "F1", "Meaning": "End List"}, ] ```

5.3.4.3.3 Modifying the BooleanExpr Column The BooleanExpr column of the ACE table is modifiable using the Set method. Some implementations MAY allow the BooleanExpr column to be set to an empty list. If the BooleanExpr column value is an empty list, that ACE cannot be satisfied and as such always resolves to False. If an implementation does not permit the BooleanExpr column to be set to an empty list, attempts to do so SHALL result in the Set method failing with a status of INVALID_PARAMETER.

Although cells in this table are marked as Read-Only with fixed access control, the access control for invocation of the Get method is (N). • The ACL column is readable only via the GetACL method. evidence.rule_summary_from_author: Opal Locking SP AccessControl associates MBRControl.Set with two ACEs. ACE_MBRControl_Admins_Set has BooleanExpr Admins and Columns Enable, Done, DoneOnReset, while ACE_MBRControl_Set_DoneToDOR has BooleanExpr Admins and Columns Done, DoneOnReset only. Core ACE Columns identify the table columns controlled by an ACE, and ACE.Set may personalize BooleanExpr without changing the ACE's Columns. Therefore personalizing only ACE_MBRControl_Set_DoneToDOR to User1 can authorize User1 to Set Done or DoneOnReset, but cannot authorize Set of Enable nor any mixed Set containing Enable.

source_snippets.text: 5.3.4.3.2 BooleanExpr Column Format The BooleanExpr column of the ACE table has a type of AC_element. Table 210 contains an encoding example of the AC_element list representing the infix ACE expression: ((00 00 00 09 00 00 00 32 AND 00 00 00 09 00 00 00 24) OR 00 00 00 09 00 00 82 73) AND 00 00 00 09 00 00 77 28 Table 210 ACE_expression Encoding Example ```json [ {"Token": "F0", "Meaning": "Start List"}, {"Token": "F2", "Meaning": "Start Name"}, {"Token": "A4 00 00 0C 05", "Meaning": "Half-UID – Authority_object_ref"}, {"Token": "A8 00 00 00 09 00 00 00 32", "Meaning": "Authority_object_ref"}, {"Token": "F3", "Meaning": "End Name"}, {"Token": "F2", "Meaning": "Start Name"}, {"Token": "A4 00 00 0C 05", "Meaning": "Half-UID – Authority_object_ref"}, {"Token": "A8 00 00 00 09 00 00 00 24", "Meaning": "Authority_object_ref"}, {"Token": "F3", "Meaning": "End Name"}, {"Token": "F2", "Meaning": "Start Name"}, {"Token": "A4 00 00 04 0E", "Meaning": "Half-UID – boolean_ACE"}, {"Token": "00", "Meaning": "boolean_ACE - AND"}, {"Token": "F3", "Meaning": "End Name"}, {"Token": "F2", "Meaning": "Start Name"}, {"Token": "A4 00 00 0C 05", "Meaning": "Half-UID – Authority_object_ref"}, {"Token": "A8 00 00 00 09 00 00 82 73", "Meaning": "Authority_object_ref"}, {"Token": "F3", "Meaning": "End Name"}, {"Token": "F2", "Meaning": "Start Name"}, {"Token": "A4 00 00 04 0E", "Meaning": "Half-UID – boolean_ACE"}, {"Token": "01", "Meaning": "boolean_ACE - OR"}, {"Token": "F3", "Meaning": "End Name"}, {"Token": "F2", "Meaning": "Start Name"}, {"Token": "A4 00 00 0C 05", "Meaning": "Half-UID – Authority_object_ref"}, {"Token": "A8 00 00 00 09 00 00 77 28", "Meaning": "Authority_object_ref"}, {"Token": "F3", "Meaning": "End Name"}, {"Token": "F2", "Meaning": "Start Name"}, {"Token": "A4 00 00 04 0E", "Meaning": "Half-UID – boolean_ACE"}, {"Token": "00", "Meaning": "boolean_ACE - AND"}, {"Token": "F3", "Meaning": "End Name"}, {"Token": "F1", "Meaning": "End List"}, ] ```

5.3.4.3.3 Modifying the BooleanExpr Column The BooleanExpr column of the ACE table is modifiable using the Set method. Some implementations MAY allow the BooleanExpr column to be set to an empty list. If the BooleanExpr column value is an empty list, that ACE cannot be satisfied and as such always resolves to False. If an implementation does not permit the BooleanExpr column to be set to an empty list, attempts to do so SHALL result in the Set method failing with a status of INVALID_PARAMETER.

Although cells in this table are marked as Read-Only with fixed access control, the access control for invocation of the Get method is (N). • The ACL column is readable only via the GetACL method. evidence.rule_summary_from_author: Opal Locking SP AccessControl associates MBRControl.Set with two ACEs. ACE_MBRControl_Admins_Set has BooleanExpr Admins and Columns Enable, Done, DoneOnReset, while ACE_MBRControl_Set_DoneToDOR has BooleanExpr Admins and Columns Done, DoneOnReset only. Core ACE Columns identify the table columns controlled by an ACE, and ACE.Set may personalize BooleanExpr without changing the ACE's Columns. Therefore personalizing only ACE_MBRControl_Set_DoneToDOR to User1 can authorize User1 to Set Done or DoneOnReset, but cannot authorize Set of Enable nor any mixed Set containing Enable.

evidence.rule_summary_from_author: Opal Locking SP AccessControl associates MBRControl.Set with two ACEs. ACE_MBRControl_Admins_Set has BooleanExpr Admins and Columns Enable, Done, DoneOnReset, while ACE_MBRControl_Set_DoneToDOR has BooleanExpr Admins and Columns Done, DoneOnReset only. Core ACE Columns identify the table columns controlled by an ACE, and ACE.Set may personalize BooleanExpr without changing the ACE's Columns. Therefore personalizing only ACE_MBRControl_Set_DoneToDOR to User1 can authorize User1 to Set Done or DoneOnReset, but cannot authorize Set of Enable nor any mixed Set containing Enable.
